product_overview: TalentAI MVP is a lightweight recruitment platform that enables candidates to create profiles and apply to jobs while employers post jobs and see ranked candidates based on a deterministic skill + pincode scoring system. The backend exposes REST endpoints for authentication, job management, candidate operations and AI-assisted career guidance.
core_goals: Provide secure candidate and employer registration, login and session management.
Allow employers to post and edit jobs (including walk-in jobs) and view ranked candidates.
Allow candidates to create profiles, view AI-matched jobs, and apply to jobs.
Compute transparent match scores using skill overlap and pincode priority, enforcing local-candidate precedence.
Offer optional AI services (salary assessment, learning paths) for candidate career guidance.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Registration, login, logout and endpoint to identify the current authenticated user.
user_flows: POST /api/register with {role,email,password,...} -> Receive 201 Created with user id

POST /api/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 OK with session cookie -> GET /api/whoami with session cookie -> Receive 200 OK with current user info -> POST /api/logout with session cookie -> Receive 200 OK
POST /api/register with an already-registered email -> Receive 400 Bad Request with error message
POST /api/login with wrong credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> GET /api/whoami without session cookie -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Job Management (Employer)
features.description: Employers can post jobs (including walk-in jobs), list their posted jobs, and edit existing jobs.
user_flows: POST /api/login with employer credentials -> Receive 200 OK with session cookie -> POST /api/employer/job with {title,required_skills,pincode,is_walk_in,walk_in_address,...} and session cookie -> Receive 201 Created with job id

GET /api/jobs/feed -> Receive 200 OK with a list of jobs (includes walk-in badge and walk_in_address when present) -> GET /api/employer/jobs with employer session cookie -> Receive 200 OK with employer's posted jobs
PUT /api/employer/job/<job_id>/edit with employer session cookie and updated fields -> Receive 200 OK with updated job
GET /api/employer/job/<job_id>/edit without proper method support (client attempts GET while view expects PUT/PATCH) -> Receive 405 Method Not Allowed
PUT /api/employer/job/<job_id>/edit with session cookie of non-owner employer -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Candidate Operations
features.description: Candidate profile retrieval/creation, view AI-matched job feed, and apply to jobs (application stores match_score).
user_flows: POST /api/login with candidate credentials -> Receive 200 OK with session cookie -> GET /api/candidate/profile with session cookie -> Receive 200 OK with candidate profile (or created profile) -> GET /api/candidate/matched-jobs with session cookie -> Receive 200 OK with list of matched jobs -> POST /api/candidate/apply with session cookie and {job_id, optional_resume_text} -> Receive 201 Created with application id and match_score
GET /api/candidate/matched-jobs without session cookie -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/candidate/apply with no candidate profile present -> Receive 400 Bad Request with 'profile required' error
POST /api/candidate/apply when candidate already has an application for same job -> Receive 200 OK updating existing application and returning updated match_score

features.name: AI Services
features.description: On-demand AI-driven salary assessment and personalized learning paths for a specific job using the configured Gemini integration.
user_flows: GET /api/candidate/job/<job_id>/salary-check with candidate session cookie -> Receive 200 OK with salary assessment (e.g., 'Fair', 'Below Average', 'Excellent') and supporting rationale
GET /api/candidate/job/<job_id>/learning-path with candidate session cookie -> Receive 200 OK with a learning roadmap listing missing skills and suggested resources
GET /api/candidate/job/<job_id>/salary-check without session cookie -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/candidate/job/<job_id>/learning-path with session cookie but AI backend unavailable or bad API key -> Receive 502 Bad Gateway with 'AI service unavailable' error

features.name: Matching & Scoring Engine (Skill + Pincode Rules)
features.description: Deterministic match score calculation (0–100) combining skill overlap (0–70) and pincode bonus (0 or 30) with enforced local-priority capping rules so same-pincode applicants always rank above non-local applicants.
user_flows: GET /api/employer/job/<job_id>/ranked-candidates with employer session cookie -> Receive 200 OK with candidates sorted by match_score descending

POST /api/candidate/apply with candidate A (pincode == job.pincode) and {job_id} -> Receive 201 Created with application and match_score 86.00 (example: skill_score 56 + location 30) -> POST /api/candidate/apply with candidate B (pincode != job.pincode) and same {job_id} -> Receive 201 Created with application and match_score 71.99 (capped below lowest local applicant) -> GET /api/employer/job/<job_id>/ranked-candidates with employer session cookie -> Receive 200 OK with candidate A listed above candidate B
GET /api/employer/job/<job_id>/ranked-candidates for a job with no applications -> Receive 200 OK with empty list

POST /api/candidate/apply to job that has no required_skills (job.required_skills == []) -> Receive 201 Created with match_score 100.00 (skill_score 70 + location_bonus 30 if pincode matches; otherwise 70 if no location match)
POST /api/candidate/apply with invalid job_id -> Receive 404 Not Found
